name: copilot-workflow
description: GitHub Copilot workflow template — replace these scripts with your project's actual commands

scripts.lint: echo '✓ Replace with your linter (e.g. eslint src --ext .ts)' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo '✓ Replace with your test runner (e.g. jest --coverage)' && exit 0
scripts.build: echo '✓ Replace with your build command (e.g. tsc --noEmit)' && exit 0
